metadata.title: Djanni Studio — Websites for craftspeople & local businesses
metadata.description: I create modern websites for local craftspeople and shop owners. No jargon, no surprises — just a site that represents you and brings in customers.

hero.subtitle: Former carpenter, now a web developer based in Dinard — I create websites that speak your language and attract your customers. I mainly work with craftspeople in Brittany: Saint-Malo, Dinard, Côte d'Émeraude and surroundings.

offres.title: Websites built for hands-on professionals.
offres.subtitle: Not generic templates. Websites designed for your trade, your area, your customers.
offres.heroSubtitle: Choose the plan that fits your project. Every plan includes personalised support from start to finish.

items.title: Fast delivery
items.text: Your site is live in 2 to 3 weeks depending on the plan. No endless delays.

items.title: Flexible payment
items.text: 50% upfront, 50% on delivery. Simple and transparent.

items.title: Support included
items.text: From 30 days to 3 months of support depending on the plan. I'm here for your questions.

personas.title: This is made for you if...

items.headline: You don't have a website at all
points: Plumber, electrician, roofer with no web presence
You're losing clients who search for you on Google
You want to be visible quickly, without hassle

items.headline: You have an outdated site or a Yellow Pages listing
points: Hairdresser, craftsperson, shopkeeper with an image to polish
You want to show your work and inspire trust
You want customers to find and contact you easily

items.headline: You have specific needs
points: Restaurant with online booking and dynamic menu
Shop with product catalog or online store

addons.title: Available options
addons.subtitle: These options can be added to any plan based on your needs.

items.label: Content writing
items.desc: I write your site content from a 30-minute conversation.

items.label: Google Business setup
items.desc: Optimised Google listing: photos, hours, description, categories.

items.label: Optional monthly maintenance
items.desc: Updates, backups, fixes — you don't have to worry about anything. No commitment, cancel anytime.

items.label: Additional page
items.desc: Extra page beyond the plan (gallery, wedding page, etc.).

roi.title: One signed job pays for your website.
roi.text: A plumber charging €600 per job only needs 2 new clients per month to recoup their site in under a year. A hairdresser with 3 extra bookings per week covers the investment from the first month.

stats.label: new clients are enough to pay for a showcase site

pricingFaq.title: Everything you need to know before getting started.

items.question: Can I start with Presence and upgrade later?
items.answer: Yes. If you start with Presence and your needs grow, we can upgrade your site to Showcase or Custom. The amount already paid is deducted from the new quote.

items.question: Is there a mandatory monthly subscription?
items.answer: No. You pay once at signing and once on delivery. Hosting on Vercel is free for your usage. The €49 monthly maintenance is 100% optional with no commitment — you can start, pause or cancel it anytime. No hidden fees.

items.question: What happens if I want to change the site after delivery?
items.answer: Small fixes are included during the support period. Beyond that, I'm available on quote. You can also opt for monthly maintenance for peace of mind.

items.question: I don't have texts or photos. Can you help?
items.answer: Yes. We write the texts together from a 30-minute conversation. If you don't have photos, we find a solution: professional stock images or local photographer partner (+€200).

items.question: What's the timeline if I don't provide content quickly?
items.answer: The 2-3 week timeline starts from when I have all the elements (texts, photos, info). If you struggle to gather content, the writing option at +€150 solves that.

items.question: Is there a guarantee on deadlines?
items.answer: Yes. If the site isn't delivered within the agreed timeline for a reason attributable to me, I grant you a 10% discount per week of delay.

cta.title: Your project deserves the best.
cta.subtitle: Let's discuss your project — first call free, no commitment.

presence.name: Presence
presence.description: You don't exist on Google. We fix that in 2 weeks.

vitrine.name: Showcase
vitrine.description: A real business tool — not just a digital business card.

surmesure.priceNote: Price set after discussion • Payment in 2 installments
surmesure.name: Custom
surmesure.description: You have specific needs. We build exactly what's required.

pourquoi.title: A dev who speaks your language.
pourquoi.subtitle: Not an agency, not a student — a web craftsman who comes from the field.

reasons.title: I come from the field
reasons.text: Before coding websites, I was building roof frames. I know the job sites, the quotes to write in the evening, the clients to reassure. No other dev can tell you that.

reasons.title: I come to you
reasons.text: Based in Dinard, I visit your premises in Saint-Malo, Dinard and across the Côte d'Émeraude. I understand your trade before talking pixels.

reasons.title: You stay in control
reasons.text: Your website doesn't belong to you if you're locked into your provider. With me: no mandatory subscription, no dependency. You're free.

reasons.title: Delivered in 2-3 weeks, not 6 months
reasons.text: A clear timeline, defined milestones. One single point of contact, reachable directly — not an agency with 5 different people.

profileCard.name: Gianni — Djanni Studio
profileCard.quote: For years, I built roof frames in the Breton rain. I learned that good work doesn't show — it's what holds up over time, without frills. I apply the same logic to the web: solid, clean, and genuinely useful.

temoignages.title: What they say.
temoignages.subtitle: Craftspeople and local businesses who trusted Djanni Studio.

process.title: 4 steps, zero surprises.
process.subtitle: A clear process from first contact to launch.

steps.title: We talk
steps.text: A 30-minute call to understand your business, your needs, and what you want to convey.

steps.title: I propose
steps.text: A clear quote and a visual mockup. You see what your site will look like before signing.

steps.title: We build
steps.text: I develop your site, you validate each step. No surprises at delivery.

steps.title: We launch
steps.text: Deployment, SSL, content management training. Your site is ready to work for you.

pricingNote: A complete showcase website from €990, delivered in 2 weeks, no nasty surprises.

faq.title: Still hesitating?
faq.subtitle: Answers to the questions everyone asks before starting their project.

items.question: How long does it take to create a website?
items.answer: On average, a Showcase plan is delivered in 2 weeks. A Custom plan takes about 3 weeks. I give you a precise timeline as soon as the quote is signed.

items.question: I know nothing about technology, is that a problem?
items.answer: Not at all. That's actually most of my clients. I handle all the technical aspects and explain everything in simple terms. For the texts, we write them together based on your words — no need to be a writer. If you don't have photos, we find a solution: local photographer or professional stock images. You don't need to prepare anything to get started.

items.question: What happens after the site goes live?
items.answer: I train you on managing your content. If you need changes later, I'm available. A maintenance plan is also offered if you want peace of mind.

items.question: Why not a WordPress or Wix site?
items.answer: These tools are convenient but limited in performance and customization. I develop custom sites that are faster, better ranked, and truly yours — no forced monthly subscription.

items.question: How does payment work?
items.answer: Simple: 50% when signing the quote, 50% on delivery. No hidden fees, no mandatory subscription. The quoted price is the final price.

items.question: Can I see the site before paying?
items.answer: Yes. I present a visual mockup before starting development. You approve the design, and only then do I build. At each stage, you can request adjustments.

items.question: Will my site be visible on Google?
items.answer: Yes. Every site is optimized for natural search (SEO) from creation: clean technical structure, properly filled tags, maximum performance. I also help you choose the right keywords for your business.

items.question: Can I edit my site myself?
items.answer: It depends on the plan chosen. For a Showcase site, changes go through me (included in the maintenance plan). For a Custom site, I can integrate a content management system if you want to be autonomous.

items.question: What area do you cover?
items.answer: My main area is the Dinard / Saint-Malo / Dinan basin — I physically visit my clients in that zone. Beyond that, I work remotely with craftspeople all over France. Video call, phone, email: we adapt.

contact.title: A project starts with a conversation.
contact.subtitle: Tell me what you do, where you are, what you're missing. I'll show you what it could look like. Free initial consultation, no commitment — just like any good craftsman.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Describe your project in a few lines...
contact.successMessage: Thank you for your message. I'll get back to you within 24 hours.

about.intro: I'm Gianni, founder of Djanni Studio. I create custom websites for craftspeople and local businesses in Brittany. My unconventional background is my strength: I understand your craft because I come from the field.

journey.title: From the worksite to code.
journey.subtitle: An uncommon path, but one that makes all the difference when working with craftspeople.

steps.title: Carpenter by trade
steps.text: I started on construction sites. Cut, adjust, assemble — building solid things with my hands. That's where I learned rigor, meeting deadlines, and the importance of work well done.

steps.title: Self-taught web developer
steps.text: In parallel, I became passionate about code. React, Next.js, TypeScript — I learned by building real projects. Same philosophy as carpentry: solid work, custom-made, no shortcuts.

steps.title: Djanni Studio was born
steps.text: I launched Djanni Studio with a clear mission: help Breton craftspeople and shop owners get a website that truly represents them. Because I know their daily life, I speak their language.

steps.title: The web accessible to craftspeople
steps.text: No jargon, no inflated prices, no endless delays. A beautiful, fast, and effective site, delivered in 2-3 weeks. It's that simple.

values.title: What I believe in.
values.subtitle: Simple principles that guide every project.

items.title: Honesty
items.text: Fixed price, clear quote, no hidden fees. What I say is what I do.

items.title: Quality
items.text: Every site is custom coded. No templates, no WordPress — clean, high-performance code.

items.title: Proximity
items.text: Based in Brittany, available for a coffee. Not a ghost provider behind a screen.

items.title: Simplicity
items.text: I explain everything in simple terms. Your only job: tell me about your business.

skills.title: The tools I use.
